title: Sneak Through Berries
description: Lets you sneak through Sweet Berry Bushes without taking damage
body:
Sneak (shift) through Sweet Berry Bushes without taking damage.

~~Why Mojang lets you sneak on literal magma but not through bushes... idk~~

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/OZJFD3SrNdM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>
